---
title: "SCP1162_Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(BPCells)
  library(data.table)
  library(Matrix)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(dplyr)
  library(AnnotationDbi)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
  library(biomaRt)
})

# --- Configuration ---
DATA_DIR <- "data"
SCP1162_DIR <- file.path(DATA_DIR, "SCP1162")

# Check if directories exist
if (!dir.exists(SCP1162_DIR)) stop("SCP1162 directory not found.")
```

## Robust ID Mapping & Helper Functions

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 2. Robust ID Mapping & Helper Functions
# ==============================================================================

## --- Helper: Load Valid Gene Symbols for Validation ---
# We need a reference set of "real" symbols to mine the messy labels
get_valid_symbols <- function() {
  keys(org.Hs.eg.db, keytype = "SYMBOL")
}

## --- Helper: Extract Gene Symbol from Composite Strings ---
# Turns "Epi_39_SEPP1_SLC26A3_EpiN8" -> "SEPP1"
extract_valid_symbol_from_tokens <- function(messy_ids, valid_set) {
  # Split by any non-alphanumeric character (underscore, dot, dash)
  # But keep dashes inside symbols (rare but exist)
  tokens_list <- strsplit(messy_ids, "[^A-Za-z0-9-]+")
  
  cleaned <- vapply(tokens_list, function(tokens) {
    # 1. Filter out common garbage tokens
    candidates <- tokens[!grepl("^(Epi|Strom|B|T|Myeloid|Mast|Plasma|Cl|cluster|nd|[0-9]+)$", tokens, ignore.case=TRUE)]
    
    # 2. Check overlap with valid symbols
    hits <- intersect(candidates, valid_set)
    
    # 3. Return the first valid hit, or NA
    if (length(hits) > 0) return(hits[1]) 
    return(NA_character_)
  }, character(1))
  
  return(cleaned)
}

## --- Main Mapping Function ---
map_ids_to_symbol_robust <- function(ids, try_biomart = TRUE) {
  ids <- unique(ids[!is.na(ids) & ids != ""])
  map_res <- data.table(original_id = ids, hgnc_symbol = NA_character_)
  
  # Load reference set
  valid_symbols <- get_valid_symbols()
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # Strategy 1: Clean ENSG IDs (e.g., ENSG00000238009.6_5 -> ENSG00000238009)
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  is_ensg <- grepl("^ENSG[0-9]+", ids)
  if (any(is_ensg)) {
    # Strip everything starting from the first period
    clean_ensg <- sub("\\..*$", "", ids[is_ensg])
    
    suppressMessages({
      loc_ens <- tryCatch(
        mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = unique(clean_ensg), column = "SYMBOL", 
               keytype = "ENSEMBL", multiVals = "first"),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    })
    
    if (!is.null(loc_ens)) {
      # Map: Original -> Clean -> Symbol
      tmp_map <- data.table(original_id = ids[is_ensg], clean_id = clean_ensg)
      tmp_map[, mapped := loc_ens[clean_id]]
      map_res[tmp_map, on = .(original_id), hgnc_symbol := i.mapped]
    }
  }
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # Strategy 2: Direct Symbol Match (for IDs that are already symbols)
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  missing <- map_res[is.na(hgnc_symbol)]
  if (nrow(missing) > 0) {
    direct_hits <- intersect(missing$original_id, valid_symbols)
    map_res[original_id %in% direct_hits, hgnc_symbol := original_id]
  }
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # Strategy 3: Token Mining (for "Epi_39_SEPP1..." garbage)
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  missing <- map_res[is.na(hgnc_symbol)]
  if (nrow(missing) > 0) {
    extracted <- extract_valid_symbol_from_tokens(missing$original_id, valid_symbols)
    
    # Update table
    dt_extracted <- data.table(original_id = missing$original_id, extracted = extracted)
    dt_extracted <- dt_extracted[!is.na(extracted)]
    
    if (nrow(dt_extracted) > 0) {
      map_res[dt_extracted, on = .(original_id), hgnc_symbol := i.extracted]
    }
  }

  return(map_res)
}

## --- Expression Calculation (BPCells) ---
select_cols_bp <- function(M, cols_idx) {
  out <- tryCatch(M[, cols_idx, drop = FALSE], error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(out)) return(out)
  BPCells::select_cells(M, cols_idx)
}

compute_expr_by_cluster_bp <- function(counts_bp, cluster_vec, cols_idx, 
                                       scale_factor = 1e4, log_base = 2) {
  M <- select_cols_bp(counts_bp, cols_idx)
  cl <- cluster_vec[cols_idx]
  keep <- !is.na(cl) & nzchar(cl)
  M <- select_cols_bp(M, which(keep))
  cl <- cl[keep]
  
  lib <- BPCells::colSums(M)
  lib[lib == 0] <- 1
  sf <- scale_factor / lib
  M_log1p <- BPCells::log1p_slow(BPCells::multiply_cols(M, sf))
  
  cl_levels <- sort(unique(cl))
  means_list <- lapply(cl_levels, function(k) {
    Mk <- select_cols_bp(M_log1p, which(cl == k))
    v <- BPCells::rowMeans(Mk)
    if (log_base == 2) v <- v / log(2)
    return(v)
  })
  
  expr_mat <- do.call(cbind, means_list)
  colnames(expr_mat) <- cl_levels
  expr_mat
}

## --- Collapse & Stats Wrapper ---
collapse_dt_to_symbol_sum_safe <- function(expr_dt, try_biomart = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(expr_dt)) return(NULL)
  dt <- copy(expr_dt)
  setnames(dt, "gene", "orig_gene")
  
  origs <- unique(dt$orig_gene)
  n_orig <- length(origs)
  
  # 1. Map IDs
  map_res <- map_ids_to_symbol_robust(origs, try_biomart = try_biomart)
  
  # 2. Assign Symbols
  map_vec <- setNames(map_res$hgnc_symbol, map_res$original_id)
  dt[, gene_symbol := map_vec[orig_gene]]
  
  # 3. Filter out rows that failed to map (Aggressive cleaning)
  #    We drop rows where gene_symbol is NA because we cannot link them to PWD anyway.
  n_unmapped <- sum(is.na(dt$gene_symbol))
  dt <- dt[!is.na(gene_symbol)]
  
  # 4. Collapse (Summation)
  numeric_cols <- setdiff(names(dt), c("orig_gene", "gene_symbol"))
  sum_dt <- dt[, lapply(.SD, sum, na.rm = TRUE), by = gene_symbol, .SDcols = numeric_cols]
  setnames(sum_dt, "gene_symbol", "gene")
  
  n_final <- nrow(sum_dt)
  
  # 5. Print Stats
  cat(sprintf("   - ID Mapping: %d input rows -> %d valid symbols found.\n", n_orig, uniqueN(dt$gene_symbol)))
  cat(sprintf("   - Dropped: %d rows (unmappable garbage/ENSG).\n", n_unmapped))
  cat(sprintf("   - Collapsed: %d duplicates merged.\n", uniqueN(dt$gene_symbol) - n_final)) # Should be 0 if uniqueN is correct
  
  return(sum_dt)
}
```


## Load PWD data

```{r}
# --- Helper: Read RDS and Log Stats ---
read_pwd_with_log <- function(filename, label) {
  fpath <- file.path(DATA_DIR, filename)
  
  if (!file.exists(fpath)) {
    warning(sprintf("   ! Missing file: %s", filename))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  dt <- readRDS(fpath)
  dt <- as.data.table(dt)
  
  # Log gene counts
  if ("gene" %in% names(dt)) {
    n_genes <- uniqueN(dt$gene)
    message(sprintf("   - %s: Loaded %d unique genes (%d rows)", label, n_genes, nrow(dt)))
  } else {
    message(sprintf("   - %s: Loaded %d rows (No 'gene' column found)", label, nrow(dt)))
  }
  
  return(dt)
}

message("Loading PWD Data...")

# 1. Load individual files with logging
pwd_tss500 <- read_pwd_with_log("pwd_TSS500.rds", "TSS500")
pwd_pels   <- read_pwd_with_log("pwd_pELS.rds",   "pELS")
pwd_dels   <- read_pwd_with_log("pwd_dELS.rds",   "dELS")

# 2. Standardization Helper
prep_pwd <- function(dt, feat_label) {
  if (is.null(dt)) return(NULL)
  dt <- as.data.table(dt)
  if (!"feature" %in% names(dt)) dt[, feature := feat_label]
  
  # Ensure required columns exist before selecting
  req_cols <- c("mean_pwd", "gene", "pair", "feature")
  if (!all(req_cols %in% names(dt))) return(NULL)
  
  dt[, .(wmean_pwd = mean_pwd, gene = gene, pair = pair, feature = feature)]
}

# 3. Combine
pwd_all <- rbindlist(list(
  prep_pwd(pwd_tss500, "TSS500"),
  prep_pwd(pwd_pels,   "pELS"),
  prep_pwd(pwd_dels,   "dELS")
))

message(sprintf("   => Combined Total: %d genes across %d rows (All Pairs)", 
                uniqueN(pwd_all$gene), nrow(pwd_all)))

# 4. Filter for Normal Pairs only
pwd_all <- pwd_all[grepl("^Normal", pair)]

message(sprintf("   => Final PWD Data (Normal Only): %d genes across %d rows", 
                uniqueN(pwd_all$gene), nrow(pwd_all)))
```

## Processing SCP1162 data

```{r}
# --- Main Pipeline ---
build_SCP1162_tables_bp <- function(counts_bp, epi, meta, try_biomart = TRUE) {
  cells <- colnames(counts_bp)
  
  # Align metadata
  epi2  <- epi[match(cells, NAME), .(ClusterFull)]
  meta2 <- meta[match(cells, NAME), .(SpecimenType, MMRStatusTumor)]
  
  status <- rep(NA_character_, length(cells))
  status[meta2$SpecimenType == "N"] <- "Normal"
  status[meta2$SpecimenType == "A"] <- "Adenoma"
  status[meta2$SpecimenType == "T" & meta2$MMRStatusTumor == "MMRd"] <- "Tumor_MMRd"
  status[meta2$SpecimenType == "T" & meta2$MMRStatusTumor == "MMRp"] <- "Tumor_MMRp"

  out_raw <- list()
  for (tag in c("Normal", "Tumor_MMRd", "Tumor_MMRp")) {
    idx <- which(!is.na(epi2$ClusterFull) & status == tag)
    if (length(idx) == 0) next
    
    message("Processing ", tag, " (", length(idx), " cells)...")
    expr_mat <- compute_expr_by_cluster_bp(counts_bp, epi2$ClusterFull, idx)
    expr_dt <- as.data.table(expr_mat, keep.rownames = "gene")
    out_raw[[tag]] <- list(expr_by_celltype = expr_dt, n_cells = length(idx))
  }

  # Collapse IDs and Compute Mean/Var across clusters
  stats_out <- lapply(names(out_raw), function(tag) {
    x <- out_raw[[tag]]
    message("Collapsing IDs for ", tag, "...")
    # 1. Collapse to Symbol
    expr_sum <- collapse_dt_to_symbol_sum_safe(x$expr_by_celltype, try_biomart = try_biomart)
    
    # 2. Compute Mean and Variance across the epithelial clusters (plasticity metrics)
    mat <- as.matrix(expr_sum[, -1, with = FALSE])
    stats_dt <- data.table(
      gene      = expr_sum$gene,
      mean_expr = rowMeans(mat, na.rm = TRUE),
      var_expr  = apply(mat, 1L, var, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
    
    list(stats = stats_dt, n_cells = x$n_cells)
  })
  names(stats_out) <- names(out_raw)

  return(stats_out)
}

# --- Execution ---
counts_bp <- BPCells::open_matrix_dir(file.path(SCP1162_DIR, "bp_counts_dir"))
epi  <- fread(file.path(SCP1162_DIR, "crc10x_tSNE_cl_Epi.tsv"))
meta <- fread(file.path(SCP1162_DIR, "metatable_v3_fix_v3.tsv"))

scp1162_results <- build_SCP1162_tables_bp(counts_bp, epi, meta, try_biomart = TRUE) # Set try_biomart=FALSE if offline
```

## Filter and merge PWD

```{r}
# Function to print intersection stats
print_filter_stats <- function(group_name, scp_genes, pwd_genes) {
  common <- intersect(scp_genes, pwd_genes)
  n_scp <- length(scp_genes)
  n_common <- length(common)
  
  cat(sprintf("\n--- %s Filter Logic ---\n", group_name))
  cat(sprintf("Genes in PWD: %d\n", length(pwd_genes)))
  cat(sprintf("Genes in SCP1162 (%s): %d\n", group_name, n_scp))
  cat(sprintf("Intersection: %d\n", n_common))
  cat(sprintf("Filtered out %d genes from SCP1162 not found in PWD data.\n", n_scp - n_common))
}

merge_pwd_expr <- function(stats_dt, pwd_dt, group_name) {
  # Print stats
  print_filter_stats(group_name, unique(stats_dt$gene), unique(pwd_dt$gene))
  
  # Inner join on gene
  merged <- merge(pwd_dt, stats_dt, by = "gene")
  merged[, Group := group_name]
  return(merged)
}

combined_data_list <- list()

if (!is.null(scp1162_results$Normal)) {
  combined_data_list[["Normal"]] <- merge_pwd_expr(scp1162_results$Normal$stats, pwd_all, "Normal")
}
if (!is.null(scp1162_results$Tumor_MMRd)) {
  combined_data_list[["MMRd"]] <- merge_pwd_expr(scp1162_results$Tumor_MMRd$stats, pwd_all, "Tumor_MMRd")
}
if (!is.null(scp1162_results$Tumor_MMRp)) {
  combined_data_list[["MMRp"]] <- merge_pwd_expr(scp1162_results$Tumor_MMRp$stats, pwd_all, "Tumor_MMRp")
}

combined_dt <- rbindlist(combined_data_list)
```

## Visusalization

```{r}
plot_scp1162_scatter <- function(dt, feature_sel, y_metric, group_sel, top_n = 5) {
  
  plot_dt <- dt[feature == feature_sel & Group == group_sel]
  
  if (nrow(plot_dt) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  y_col <- if (y_metric == "mean") "mean_expr" else "var_expr"
  y_lab <- if (y_metric == "mean") "Mean Expression (log2 CP10k)" else "Expression Variance"
  
  # Identify Top Genes
  avg_y <- plot_dt[, .(val = mean(get(y_col))), by = gene][order(-val)][1:top_n]
  label_dt <- plot_dt[gene %in% avg_y$gene]

  p <- ggplot(plot_dt, aes(x = wmean_pwd, y = .data[[y_col]])) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 1, color = "#2c3e50") +
    geom_text_repel(data = label_dt, aes(label = gene), size = 3, 
                    box.padding = 0.5, max.overlaps = Inf, color = "steelblue") +
    facet_wrap(~pair, scales = "free_x") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("SCP1162 ", group_sel, " (", feature_sel, "): ", y_lab, " vs PWD"),
      x = "Methylation Divergence (PWD)",
      y = y_lab
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# --- Loop through Groups and Features ---
features <- c("TSS500", "pELS", "dELS")
groups <- unique(combined_dt$Group)

for (grp in groups) {
  cat("\n### Plots for ", grp, "\n")
  for (feat in features) {
    print(plot_scp1162_scatter(combined_dt, feat, "mean", grp))
    print(plot_scp1162_scatter(combined_dt, feat, "var", grp))
  }
}
```

```{r}
summary_table <- combined_dt[, .(
  N_Genes = uniqueN(gene),
  Avg_Expression = mean(mean_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
  Avg_Variance   = mean(var_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
  Avg_PWD        = mean(wmean_pwd, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(Group, feature, pair)]

print(summary_table)
# write.csv(summary_table, file.path(DATA_DIR, "SCP1162_PWD_Summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```
